Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1082 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}I know you've been busy lately, but you all remembered to do your homework, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1082 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Just because you're not taking a humanities class next year doesn't mean you can blow off classic lit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}What's wrong, Fuuka? You look kinda down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Talk to me. What's bothering you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I'd never seen him in school, but he'd always be hanging around town...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}And now, he's just... gone. It's hard to put it into words.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I took it for granted that everyone would always be around, that nothing would ever change...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}But, some things you can never get back... I didn't consider how easily it could happen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Once I realized that, I started thinking about my parents.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I've sort of been avoiding the question, but... is it okay for me to leave things with them like this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Parents, huh...? Yeah, that's a tough one.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}But, I think you'll work it out, Fuuka.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1082 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Moriyama, what are you waiting for? Come on up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1082 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Would it kill you to give your classmates a proper goodbye?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Uhhh, hi, everyone. I know I haven't been here that long, but I feel like I've made some good friends.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 223 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I'll remember each and every one of you after I transfer. Thank you all... How's that?[n]{f 1 1}
